items.title: Is Pantene’s New Hair-Loss Line a Subtle Shift in P&G’s (PG) Beauty Investment Focus?
items.description: Pantene, a Procter & Gamble brand, recently launched its Abundant & Strong Collection, a three-step system using antioxidant technology to reduce shedding and improve hair density by targeting scalp oxidative stress. This move highlights P&G’s push into clinically supported, accessible hair-loss solutions, potentially widening its reach among the many women seeking effective, affordable treatments. Next, we’ll explore how this clinically backed hair-loss innovation fits into Procter &...
